message:
fix(http): add PrefetchedDataRemaining error for request_with_io upgrade safety

request_with_io() now returns HttpError::PrefetchedDataRemaining when
unread bytes remain in the parser buffer after body drain. This catches
the case where a caller uses the fully-buffered API for a 101 protocol
upgrade — the prefetched upgrade bytes would be silently lost.

Changes:
- New HttpError::PrefetchedDataRemaining(usize) variant in codec.rs
  with Display impl showing byte count
- request_with_io() checks into_inner_with_buffer() and returns the
  new error if prefetched bytes are non-empty
- Doc comment on request_with_io() updated to mention the error and
  recommend request_streaming() for upgrade scenarios
- Test: request_with_io_rejects_unread_prefetched_bytes validates that
  a 101 response with trailing WebSocket frame bytes triggers the error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
